Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enter Judgment Pursuant To Ccp 664.6
Off Calendar Mar-22-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested. PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB's Motion To Enter Judgment Pursuant To CCP 664.6 is Granted. No opposition filed. The Court signed the proposed order and proposed judgment that were emailed to the court. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
